step_by_step_thinking:
I agree that pulmonary hypoplasia is indeed the leading cause of death for congenital diaphragmatic hernia patients. The severe underdevelopment of lung tissue severely compromises breathing function immediately post-birth and can progressively worsen over time if not addressed surgically soon after delivery.

Answer choice: C.
